title: limnanthes douglasii subsp. ornduffii
intro: Limnanthes douglasii subsp. ornduffii, also known as the Douglas's meadowfoam, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Limnanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Douglas's meadowfoam include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
